    • • • • • • , you’re getting easy access to exclusive business discounts with your work account.

    Keep your devices protected with Microsoft

    For personal and family For business

    Microsoft Complete

    Work and play worry-free. Protect your device purchase against accidents.

    Accidents happen and that’s okay

    Protection from drops, spills, and cracked screens.

    Unexpected failures

    Coverage for mechanical or electrical failure and device defects.

    Technical support

    Expert help when you need it.
      

     Coverage at a glance

      
     

    Surface

    Unexpected malfunctions? Accidental mishaps? No worries. We’ll repair your device, and if we can’t fix it, we’ll send you a replacement.

    • Number of claims: 2 for device; 1 for in-box power supply; 1 for each in-box Surface accessory.
    • Coverage start: Accidental Damage from Handling (ADH) is covered from purchase date; breakdown coverage begins after Limited Hardware Warranty ends.
    • Prepaid return shipping included.
    • Easy service and support through your Microsoft account.
    Shop Surface Copilot+ PC

    Xbox

    Get up to three years of coverage from drops and spills, plus first repairs and replacement.

    • Number of claims: 1 for console; 2 for standard controllers (or 1 for Elite controller); 1 for in-box power supply.
    • Coverage start: Accidental Damage from Handling (ADH) is covered from purchase date; breakdown coverage begins after manufacturer warranty ends.
    • Prepaid return shipping included.
    • Software and hardware support.
    Shop Xbox consoles

    Microsoft Complete

    Work and play worry-free. Protect your device purchase against accidents.

    Stay covered, for longer

    Get up to 4 years of additional device coverage.

    Accidents happen and that’s okay

    Protect your device purchase from drops, spills, or cracked screens.

    Help when you need it

    Tap into technical support from experts.
      
        

    How do you get Microsoft Complete?

       
         
    Option 1

    Add it when you buy a new Surface or Xbox

    Make sure you’re covered from the get-go by adding Microsoft Complete at the time of device purchase.
    Shop now
    Option 2

    Add it after purchase is completed

    For Xbox and Surface: buy Microsoft Complete through your Microsoft Account. For Surface only: buy it directly from the Surface App.
    Sign into your Microsoft account Get the Surface App
    Option 3

    Contact Microsoft Support

    You can also get Microsoft Complete by contacting one of our support service agents to check your device eligibility.﻿﻿
    Contact Microsoft Support
       

    Tech support when you need it

    Already have a Microsoft protection plan? We can help with everything from registering your device to coverage status and expert technical support.
    Check coverage status Call us at 1 800-642-7676

    Frequently asked questions

    |

    • Microsoft Complete is an extended protection plan available for select Microsoft devices (such as eligible Surface devices and Xbox consoles, depending on your market). It generally provides coverage beyond the standard limited warranty, depending on the plan terms for your device and region, and includes protection for mechanical breakdowns and accidental damage from handling such as drops, spills, and cracked screens.

    • Coverage varies by device and region. Microsoft Complete generally includes protection for mechanical breakdowns and may include accidental damage from handling (for example, drops or spills), subject to limits, exclusions, and any applicable service fees and claim allowances in the plan terms.

    • Pricing varies by device, coverage term, and country/region. You’ll see the price for your eligible device during purchase (or when adding Microsoft Complete, where available).

    • The standard Microsoft limited warranty generally covers certain defects in materials and workmanship for a limited period. Microsoft Complete can extend coverage and may add benefits such as accidental damage from handling, depending on the plan terms for your device and region.

    • Coverage term options vary by device and country/region. The available term (and start date) will be shown when you purchase Microsoft Complete and in your plan terms.

    • In many markets, Microsoft Complete can be purchased when you buy an eligible device and, in some cases, within a limited time after purchase. Eligibility windows and any inspection requirements vary by device, channel, and region. See the offer details in your market. 

    • Many Microsoft Complete plans include accidental damage from handling (for example, drops or spills). Coverage is subject to the applicable plan terms, including limits, exclusions, and any claim allowances or service fees.

    • Microsoft Complete may be available for eligible Surface devices, depending on model and market. Coverage benefits, term options, and pricing vary—check availability and details for your specific device in your region.

    • Microsoft Complete may be available for eligible Xbox consoles, depending on your market. Coverage for controllers/accessories varies by offer and region. See your plan terms for what’s included.

    • You can file a Microsoft Complete claim by signing in to your Microsoft account, selecting your registered device, and choosing the service or repair option. Microsoft will guide you through available service options, which may include mail-in repair or replacement.

    • An extended warranty is a protection plan that extends coverage beyond the terms of the Standard manufacturer’s standard OEM warranty. It may include protection for hardware failures and, in some plans, accidental damage. Extended warranties provide added peace of mind after the original warranty expires.

    • Not always. Some plans cover only mechanical breakdowns. Other plans may include accidental damage from handling, subject to limits and exclusions. If offered for your device and region, Microsoft Complete may include accidental damage coverage—see the plan terms for details.

    How do you get Microsoft Complete?

    Option 1

    Add it when you buy a new Surface

    Make sure you’re covered from the get-go by adding Microsoft Complete at the time of device purchase.
    Shop now
    Option 2

    Contact Microsoft Support

    You can also get Microsoft Complete by contacting one of our support service agents to check your device eligibility.﻿﻿
    Contact Microsoft Support

    Why buy from Microsoft Store

    Free 2-3 day shipping

    Free shipping at no cost, no minimum amount.
    Learn more about shipping

    Buy now, pay later. As low as 0% APR.

    Flexible payment options help you pay how you want, at Microsoft Store.
    Learn about flexible payment options

    Microsoft Complete

    Get coverage on accidental damage for up to four years. Shop smarter with Microsoft Complete and get technical support as well.
    Learn about Microsoft Complete

    Free 60-day returns

    Return almost any physical product within 60 days in like new condition in its original packaging for a full refund. Some exclusions apply.
    Learn about returns
    Learn about all the benefits of shopping at Microsoft Store​
    Discounts: Supplies limited. Actual savings depends on product availability.
    • Returns: Available with eligible physical products purchased from Microsoft Store online and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets. Return process must be started within 60 days after customer receives the product. Limit 5 product returns per eligible customer purchase. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Xbox Ally, Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit. Applicable return policy applies. For purchases made at Microsoft Store, see applicable Microsoft Terms of Sale for more information. For purchases made at a Microsoft Experience Center, see receipt for more information. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.
    • Price protection: Microsoft Store Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new or refurbished consumer and commercial physical products made at Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new consumer physical products from Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Excludes commercial and refurbished products. An Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment cannot be requested at time of purchase. Microsoft reserves the right to verify an eligible retailer’s advertised price and availability of the product. The product sold by the eligible retailer must be identical to the product sold by Microsoft and must be in stock for purchase at the eligible retailer at the reduced price. Exclusions apply. Both price adjustments: Price Adjustment must be requested within 60 days after the customer receives the product and cannot be completed at time of purchase. Customer is eligible only if the product is in stock for purchase at Microsoft Store or a Microsoft Experience Center. Customer must contact Microsoft to request the adjustment. For purchases from Microsoft Store, contact Microsoft Store Sales and Support with your Microsoft Account information and any other information requested by a representative. For purchases from a Microsoft Experience Center, you must return to the location with your receipt. Limit 1 price adjustment total per product. Excludes Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit. See Microsoft Store Price Protection for full terms and full list of eligible retailers.

    • Trade-In: Available only through the Microsoft Store online in the United States. Offer valid for reimbursements after trade in of a qualifying device (PC, laptop, mobile phone, tablet, or video game console). To be eligible for trade in, (i) you must own the qualifying device, (ii) the device must power on, (iii) the battery must hold a charge (the device must not be required to be plugged in to operate), and (iv) the device must be in fully-functional, working condition and not have broken or missing components, a cracked display or screen, liquid damage, modification(s) or the device warranty seal broken. The device cannot be password protected and must include its original chargers, accessories, and hard drive. Customer must mail in the qualifying trade-in device to be eligible for reimbursement. Devices determined to not meet eligibility criteria may be shipped back to the customer or recycled. Recycled devices are not eligible for cash back. All trade-ins are final. Cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or gift cards, or credit towards other devices or products. May not be combined with other offers. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

      This offer is operated by Teladvance, LLC and is not sponsored by Microsoft. Any appraised value will be determined at trade in and provided by Teladvance. All trade-ins and reimbursements are subject to Teladvance’s sole discretion and approval.

    For all Protection Plans, please read the Terms and Conditions for the limits of what we will cover and the things that are not covered under the Protection Plan.

    This Protection Plan is classified as a service contract per local regulations.

    This information is provided for summary purposes only. Terms and conditions apply; visit our Terms and Conditions to review the Microsoft Complete service contract. Coverage is provided by Northcoast Warranty Services, Inc., 800 Superior Avel, E, 21st Floor, Cleveland, OH 44144 (in FL: coverage is provided by Technology Insurance Company, Inc. (as obligor), 59 Maiden Ln., 43rd Fl., NY, NY 10038, FL Lic. #03605) (in TX: Northcoast Warranty Services, Inc. is the Service Contract Administrator, TX Lic. 651). None of the aforementioned parties are affiliated with any manufacturer. 

    For protection plan support visit Microsoft Support

    •  

    Why shop at Microsoft Store for your business

    Consider us your go-to specialists for Microsoft products and services. Whether you’re a company of three or 300, our product experts can help you find the right Microsoft devices, software, and resources to meet your goals and grow your business.
    Learn more

    Do more and save with your free work account​

    Get easy access to exclusive business discounts and simplified account management with a shopping experience built for business.​
    Manage your account

    Fast shipping and free returns​

    Enjoy free 2-3 day shipping with no minimum purchase required. Plus, get free 60-day returns on almost any physical product.
    ﻿﻿﻿﻿Some exclusions apply.
    See shipping details Learn about returns

    60-day price protection​

    Buy now, enjoy price protection for 60 days from your delivery date. If we drop the price of a select physical product, contact us and we’ll honor a one-time price adjustment. Exclusions apply.
    Learn about price protection

    Work worry-free with extended coverage​

    Accidents happen but business must go on. Avoid unplanned setbacks and expenses, with up to 4 years coverage when you purchase one of our Microsoft protection plans.​
    Learn about protection plans

    Returns: Available with eligible physical products purchased from Microsoft Store online and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets. Return process must be started within 60 days after customer receives the product. Limit 5 product returns per eligible customer purchase. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Xbox Ally, Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.

    Applicable return policy applies. For purchases made at Microsoft Store, see applicable Microsoft Terms of Sale for more information. For purchases made at a Microsoft Experience Center, see receipt for more information. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

    Microsoft Store Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying physical consumer products and Surface for Business devices made at Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Price adjustments for Surface for Business devices can be made via credit card for purchases made on icrosoft.com website only.​

    Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new consumer physical products from Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally, ROG Xbox Ally X, Surface for Business devices and accessories, and refurbished products. An Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment cannot be requested at time of purchase. Microsoft reserves the right to verify an eligible retailer’s advertised price and availability of the product. The product sold by the eligible retailer must be identical to the product sold by Microsoft and must be in stock for purchase at the eligible retailer at the reduced price. Exclusions apply. ​

    Both price adjustments: Price adjustment must be requested within 60 days after the customer receives the product and cannot be completed at time of purchase. Customer is eligible only if the product is in stock for purchase at Microsoft Store or a Microsoft Experience Center. Customer must contact Microsoft to request the adjustment. For purchases from Microsoft Store, contact Microsoft Store Sales and Support and provide any information requested by a representative. For purchases from a Microsoft Experience Center, you must return to the location with your receipt. Limit 1 price adjustment per product. Excludes Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.

    See Microsoft Store Price Protection for full terms and full list of eligible retailers. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

    For all Protection Plans, please read the Terms and Conditions for the limits of what we will cover and the things that are not covered under the Protection Plan.

    This Protection Plan is classified as a service contract per local regulations.

    This information is provided for summary purposes only. Terms and conditions apply; visit our Terms and Conditions to review the Microsoft Complete service contract. Coverage is provided by Northcoast Warranty Services, Inc., 800 Superior Avel, E, 21st Floor, Cleveland, OH 44144 (in FL: coverage is provided by Technology Insurance Company, Inc. (as obligor), 59 Maiden Ln., 43rd Fl., NY, NY 10038, FL Lic. #03605) (in TX: Northcoast Warranty Services, Inc. is the Service Contract Administrator, TX Lic. 651). None of the aforementioned parties are affiliated with any manufacturer. 

    For protection plan support visit Microsoft Support

    Microsoft protection plans for business

    Work worry-free with extended coverage.

    Stay covered, for longer

    Get up to 4 years of additional device coverage.

    Respond

    Get your device back up and running.

    Help when you need it

    Tap into technical support from Microsoft experts.
        

    Compare plans

    Every Surface PC comes with a minimum of 1-year Microsoft Hardware Limited Warranty. To maximize and protect your Surface investment beyond the warranty, purchase a Microsoft protection plan.
      
    Microsoft Extended Hardware Service Microsoft Extended Hardware Service Plus Microsoft Complete for Business Microsoft Complete for Business Plus
    Duration: Up to 2, 3, or 4 years Duration: Up to 2, 3, or 4 years Duration: Up to 2, 3, or 4 years Duration: Up to 2, 3, or 4 years
    Prepaid return shipment paid by Microsoft Prepaid return shipment paid by Microsoft Prepaid return shipment paid by Microsoft Prepaid return shipment paid by Microsoft
    Technical support from Microsoft Technical support from Microsoft Technical support from Microsoft Technical support from Microsoft
    Unlimited mechanical breakdowns2 Unlimited mechanical breakdowns1 Unlimited mechanical breakdowns1 Unlimited mechanical breakdowns1
                                                       Battery wear     Battery wear
                                                                                                                             Accidental damage from handling1 Accidental damage from handling1
                                                     Advanced Exchange Service2                                                   Advanced Exchange Service2
                                         Next Business Day3                                        Next Business Day3
                                     Drive Retention4                                      Drive Retention4
        

    How do you get a Microsoft protection plan?

        
         
    Option 1

    Add it when you buy a new Surface for Business PC

    Make sure you’re covered from the get-go by adding a Microsoft protection plan at the time of PC purchase.
    Shop now
    Option 2

    Add it after you buy a new, eligible Surface for Business PC

    You can also get a Microsoft protection plan by contacting one of our support service agents to check your PC eligibility.
    Contact Microsoft Support
     

    Tech support when you need it

    Already have a Microsoft protection plan? We can help with everything from registering your device to coverage status and expert technical support.
    Check coverage status Call us at 1 800-642-7676
      

    Why shop at Microsoft Store for your business

    Consider us your go-to specialists for Microsoft products and services. Whether you’re a company of three or 300, our product experts can help you find the right Microsoft devices, software, and resources to meet your goals and grow your business.
    Learn more

    Do more and save with your free work account​

    Get easy access to exclusive business discounts and simplified account management with a shopping experience built for business.​
    Manage your account

    Fast shipping and free returns​

    Enjoy free 2-3 day shipping with no minimum purchase required. Plus, get free 60-day returns on almost any physical product.
    ﻿﻿﻿﻿Some exclusions apply.
    See shipping details Learn about returns

    60-day price protection​

    Buy now, enjoy price protection for 60 days from your delivery date. If we drop the price of a select physical product, contact us and we’ll honor a one-time price adjustment. Exclusions apply.
    Learn about price protection

    Work worry-free with extended coverage​

    Accidents happen but business must go on. Avoid unplanned setbacks and expenses, with up to 4 years coverage when you purchase one of our Microsoft protection plans.​
    Learn about protection plans
       

    [1] Additional extended coverage for mechanical breakdown and accidental damage from handling is available through the purchase of Microsoft protection plans. If the plan provides additional Mechanical Breakdown coverage, that coverage begins upon expiration of the manufacturer’s original warranty and continues for the remainder of the term shown on the Holder’s Proof of Purchase. Accidental damage from handling begins immediately upon purchase. Restrictions apply, for all Protection Plans, please reference the terms and conditions for the limit of liability and the applicable exclusions of the Protection Plan. 

    [2] With Advanced Exchange Service (AES) Microsoft will ship a replacement device to you in advance of receipt of an eligible and covered device when you submit a service request for an eligible Microsoft Surface for Business device. Advanced Exchange Service is available at no additional charge with the Microsoft Limited Hardware Warranty for the following business devices: Surface Laptop 2, Surface Laptop 3, Surface Laptop 4, Surface Laptop 5, Surface Laptop Go, Surface Laptop Go 2, Surface Go 2, Surface Go 3, Surface Book 3, Surface Pro 6, Surface Pro 7, Surface Pro 7+, Surface Pro 8, Surface Pro X, Surface Pro 9, and Surface Laptop Studio or when purchased with a commercial Microsoft Protection Plan. 

    Advanced Exchange is only available in supported markets. Restrictions apply. See Surface for Business warranty page for AES terms and conditions and list of supported markets. 

    [3] Next Business Day Replacement claims authorization must be fulfilled prior to the applicable cut-off period to benefit from this service. In addition, the Next Day Business Replacement service is only valid from Monday through Friday, excluding standard public holidays. 

    [4] Drive Retention permits customers the option to retain their removable drive during service events at no additional charge. Drive Retention is only available on Microsoft Surface devices in which the drive is marketed as removable per the technical specifications on the product’s description page. Microsoft recommends that only technically inclined individuals with the knowledge, experience, and required tools perform the drive removal following Microsoft’s instructions. Opening and/or repairing your device can present electric shock, device damage, fire and personal injury risks, and other hazards. Use caution if undertaking do-it-yourself repairs. Further, any resulting damage to the device or component will not be covered under the Microsoft Limited Hardware Warranty or Protection Plans. 

    In many markets, Microsoft protection plans can be purchased when you buy an eligible device and, in some cases, within a limited time after purchase. Eligibility windows and any inspection requirements vary by device, channel, and region. See the offer details in your market. 

    For all Protection Plans, please read the Terms and Conditions for the limits of what we will cover and the things that are not covered under the Protection Plan. 

    In the US, Protection Plans are classified as a service contract per state regulations.

    This information is provided for summary purposes only. Terms and conditions apply; visit our Terms and Conditions to review the Microsoft Complete service contract. Coverage is provided by Northcoast Warranty Services, Inc., 800 Superior Avel, E, 21st Floor, Cleveland, OH 44144 (in FL: coverage is provided by Technology Insurance Company, Inc. (as obligor), 59 Maiden Ln., 43rd Fl., NY, NY 10038, FL Lic. #03605) (in TX: Northcoast Warranty Services, Inc. is the Service Contract Administrator, TX Lic. 651). None of the aforementioned parties are affiliated with any manufacturer. 

    For protection plan support visit Microsoft Support.

    *See Microsoft Store Price Protection for full terms and full list of eligible retailers. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

    Returns: Available with eligible physical products purchased from Microsoft Store online and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets. Return process must be started within 60 days after customer receives the product. Limit 5 product returns per eligible customer purchase. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Xbox Ally, Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.

    Applicable return policy applies. For purchases made at Microsoft Store, see applicable Microsoft Terms of Sale for more information. For purchases made at a Microsoft Experience Center, see receipt for more information. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

    Microsoft Store Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying physical consumer products and Surface for Business devices made at Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Price adjustments for Surface for Business devices can be made via credit card for purchases made on microsoft.com website only.

    Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new consumer physical products from Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally, ROG Xbox Ally X, Surface for Business devices and accessories, and refurbished products. An Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment cannot be requested at time of purchase. Microsoft reserves the right to verify an eligible retailer’s advertised price and availability of the product. The product sold by the eligible retailer must be identical to the product sold by Microsoft and must be in stock for purchase at the eligible retailer at the reduced price. Exclusions apply. ​

    Both price adjustments: Price adjustment must be requested within 60 days after the customer receives the product and cannot be completed at time of purchase. Customer is eligible only if the product is in stock for purchase at Microsoft Store or a Microsoft Experience Center. Customer must contact Microsoft to request the adjustment. For purchases from Microsoft Store, contact Microsoft Store Sales and Support and provide any information requested by a representative. For purchases from a Microsoft Experience Center, you must return to the location with your receipt. Limit 1 price adjustment per product. Excludes Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.
